mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (event_type, title, message, related_id) VALUES (#{eventType}, #{title}, #{message}, #{relatedId}) RETURNING notification_id
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, event_type, title, message, related_id, is_read, TO_CHAR(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM notification ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE is_read = false
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = true WHERE notification_id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = true WHERE is_read = false
